reply.text: Bold claim but im convinced you make any room feel like vacation

messages.text: im just confused how one bench turned into a whole beach ad
you really flirting with colors now, is that your move
my move was hoping the girl who matches her shoes to the boards
you acting like i planned a surfboard sneaker strategy
guilty, this the only resort with headphones and attitude included
bold to assume id waste caffeine time on you
fair, ill retire my vacation pitch then, you win this one
smart choice, keep dreaming of the resort, not for me
for someone unsure you sure text fast
wednesday night. i'll pick you up
